default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog cannibalization issue identified; team to replace underperforming content and set up redirects](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Flosum seeking recommendations for homepage improvements and user experience enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide analysis and suggestions for homepage optimization within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Discussion on highlighting case studies and leveraging differentiators in Flosum's marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content Optimization

  - [Identified potential cannibalization between two Salesforce data governance blogs](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Existing blog (published March) underperforming with only 29 views in 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [New blog content more in-depth and likely to rank better](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Decision: Replace existing content with new blog and set up URL redirect](https://fathom.video/share/rP-qQp_yK-sXdi6VqKD7HG2QywM2sQTo?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Homepage and UX Improvements
